ModMetaData.name: Pawn Diary — Example Adapter (template)
ModMetaData.author: aimmlegate
ModMetaData.description: Developer tool and canonical integration example for the Pawn Diary API. Adds an in-game API Explorer window (Dev mode → Debug Actions → Pawn Diary Example Adapter → Open API explorer…) that exercises every public PawnDiaryApi method from a three-pane UI: a method tree, a request form, and a running result log with copy/clear. Also ships four quick dev actions (submit example event, preview prompt, dump context bundle) and demonstrates the two process-global hooks an integration registers (entry-status listener + pawn-context provider). Not intended for normal play — copy this folder to start a real adapter (see INTEGRATIONS.md in the Pawn Diary repo).
